items.name_en: Chanel💦24A cf mini This appearance is truly too beautiful. AS4924
items.name_cn:
Chanel💦24A cf mini This appearance is truly too beautiful. AS4924
Gentle texture and elegant design exude a luxurious atmosphere~ Unique handle adds more temperament. The gold Double C logo is not just an embellishment but a symbol of a state, making every opening a visual and tactile feast, unforgettable at first sight, endowing this bag with an irreplicable personality. The shape is small and exquisite, convenient to carry and very practical~ All items needed for going out can be easily put away.
Super easy on the eyes. Size: 20cm
